company.name: Rocking (PTY) LTD
company.registeredOffice: Unit A3, Westlake Square, Westlake Drive, Westlake, 7945, South Africa

doc.projectIntro: This quote covers the supply of Dell laptop parts and associated workshop labour for 3 units. Imported parts have an ETA of +/- 2 weeks from payment. Import orders close 12pm every Thursday. All prices exclude VAT (15%).

items.description: Dell Vostro 5590 Palmrest with US Keyboard
Dell V5510 Palmrest with US Keyboard (No Touchpad)

items.detail: Assess and install fee for 3 units | Lab fee remains if repaired or not | 12 months warranty on imported parts

doc.summaryNote: Note: Upfront payment required for parts order. Imported parts are non-refundable. Prices may vary due to R/$ exchange rate fluctuations.
terms: This quote is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.
All prices exclude VAT at 15% unless otherwise stated.
Payment is due in full prior to parts being ordered.
Imported parts have an ETA of approximately 2 weeks from payment received.
Import orders close at 12pm every Thursday.
Imported parts are non-refundable once ordered.
12 months warranty applies to imported parts.
Workshop labour fee applies whether repair is successful or not.

banking.branch: Blue Route Mall, Tokai Road, Tokai, 7945
banking.reference: Please use quote number as payment reference.
